description: Vertical, portrait orientation outreach graphic for ICE's VOICE (Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement) office. The right two thirds is a softly lit stock photograph of two people holding hands, one set of hands clasping another's hand, with a seated person in a light blue top partly visible. The left third is a semi-transparent teal and blue panel overlaying the photo, carrying white text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by 'HELP' in large bold white caps. An orange diagonal accent shape appears at the right edge. A white footer bar at the bottom contains the contact line '1-855-48-VOICE' (blue, with VOICE bold) and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE' (orange), beside the VOICE logo: a blue 'V' check style mark with 'VOICE' in serif caps over the subtitle 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT.'
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VOICE - Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement
